name: check_ip_security
description: Check if an IP address is associated with security threats. Returns whether the IP is a known proxy, VPN, TOR exit node, bot, spam source, or cloud provider, along with a threat score. Useful for fraud detection and access control.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to check. Omit to check the caller's own IP.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Must be set to 'security' to include the security assessment module.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. Use to limit response to just security data.
